cost_usd.note: Estimated cost at Haiku pricing ($0.80/1M input, $4.00/1M output). Multi-provider adversarial reviews (5 providers) not included in user cost.

major_issues: TOCTOU race on status transition — concurrent updates can bypass state machine
React hook missing setQuery export — search feature frozen at initialQuery
Side effects coupled inside transaction — Redis failure rolls back DB
Empty catch blocks hiding real infrastructure failures
Date deserialization from JSON breaks Order type contract
Missing argument assertions on mocks — multi-tenant isolation not verified
Payment flow untested — charge calls not asserted in any test
Weak error assertions (rejects.toThrow() without type) mask different failures
Missing boundary value tests (zero quantity/price not tested)
Missing negative path tests (non-existent order deletion not tested)
AbortController test verifies mock wiring, not actual abort() calls

r1_to_r2: Added TOCTOU protection: conditional update on status read
Added setQuery export to React hook
Fixed AbortController reuse with per-request controller instance
Moved side effects outside transaction (Redis, audit log)
Added input validation for quantities and prices
Fixed Date deserialization in cached results
Improved error handling in bulk updates

r3_to_r4: Added specific argument assertions on all mocks
Added payment flow tests (charge call verification)
Changed generic .rejects.toThrow() to specific error messages
Added negative path tests (non-existent order, null cases)
Fixed AbortController test to verify signal.aborted instead of listener
Added request ordering test (stale response handling)
Added organization scope verification in all queries

summary: Haiku successfully implemented production code and comprehensive tests through a 4-round adversarial feedback loop. Round 1 code had 30 adversarial findings (8 critical, 21 warning). After fixes in R2, the code addressed major issues: typos, concurrency races, type contract violations, and side effect coupling. Round 3 tests (44 cases) were written but had 16 adversarial findings. Round 4 improvements added specific assertions, boundary testing, and request ordering verification. Final deliverables: 2 production files (456 LOC), 2 test files (1070 LOC, 44 test cases), 2 adversarial review artifacts.
